summary: Risky AI Workflow has material production-readiness gaps with an overall score of 65/100. The audit found 1 critical issue(s), 7 total finding(s), and 3 node(s).

criticalIssues.message: Possible hardcoded secret detected in OpenAI.
criticalIssues.recommendation: Move secrets into n8n credentials or environment variables and rotate any value that was committed or shared.

warnings.message: No obvious error handling or failure branch was detected.
warnings.recommendation: Add an Error Trigger workflow, continue-on-fail branches, or explicit failure handling for critical nodes.

warnings.message: HTTP request nodes were found without obvious retry, timeout, or fallback indicators.
warnings.recommendation: Configure retries, timeouts, idempotency safeguards, and fallback paths for external API calls.

warnings.message: HTTP request nodes were found without obvious validation or authentication indicators.
warnings.recommendation: Use n8n credentials, authenticated request settings, signed headers, or upstream validation before sending data to external APIs.

warnings.message: AI or LLM nodes were found without clear structured output instructions.
warnings.recommendation: Use JSON schema, output parsers, or explicit structured response contracts before downstream automation steps.

warnings.message: 3 node name(s) are too generic to explain intent.
warnings.recommendation: Rename nodes to describe the business action, expected data, and destination system.

warnings.message: Possible personal data fields were detected in node parameters or prompts.
warnings.recommendation: Confirm data minimization, masking, retention rules, and consent requirements before production use.

recommendedFixes.title: No Error Handling
recommendedFixes.action: Add an Error Trigger workflow, continue-on-fail branches, or explicit failure handling for critical nodes.

recommendedFixes.title: Http Without Retry
recommendedFixes.action: Configure retries, timeouts, idempotency safeguards, and fallback paths for external API calls.

recommendedFixes.title: Http Without Validation Or Auth
recommendedFixes.action: Use n8n credentials, authenticated request settings, signed headers, or upstream validation before sending data to external APIs.

recommendedFixes.title: Ai Without Structured Output
recommendedFixes.action: Use JSON schema, output parsers, or explicit structured response contracts before downstream automation steps.

recommendedFixes.title: Generic Node Names
recommendedFixes.action: Rename nodes to describe the business action, expected data, and destination system.

recommendedFixes.title: Possible Hardcoded Secret
recommendedFixes.action: Move secrets into n8n credentials or environment variables and rotate any value that was committed or shared.

recommendedFixes.title: Possible Personal Data
recommendedFixes.action: Confirm data minimization, masking, retention rules, and consent requirements before production use.

productionChecklist.label: Workflow parses as n8n JSON
productionChecklist.detail: The uploaded JSON has a plausible n8n nodes and connections shape.

productionChecklist.label: Error handling exists
productionChecklist.detail: Production workflows should have an Error Trigger, failure branch, or continue-on-fail strategy.

productionChecklist.label: Webhook inputs are validated
productionChecklist.detail: Webhook workflows should authenticate requests and validate payload shape before side effects.

productionChecklist.label: HTTP calls use validation or authentication indicators
productionChecklist.detail: External HTTP calls should use n8n credentials, authenticated request settings, signed headers, or validated payloads.

productionChecklist.label: External calls have retry or fallback behavior
productionChecklist.detail: HTTP calls should define retries, timeouts, fallback paths, or idempotent recovery.

productionChecklist.label: AI outputs are structured
productionChecklist.detail: LLM steps should return predictable schemas before downstream automation consumes the result.

productionChecklist.label: Secrets are not hardcoded
productionChecklist.detail: Credentials should live in n8n credentials or environment variables, not node parameters.

productionChecklist.label: Workflow is documented
productionChecklist.detail: Complex workflows need sticky notes or documentation that explain ownership and assumptions.

productionChecklist.label: Alerting or logging exists for external dependencies
productionChecklist.detail: External calls should emit useful logs or notify owners when production behavior degrades.

suggestedNextSteps: Fix critical security and production-readiness findings first.
Add and test explicit failure handling before connecting live data.
Review personal data handling, retention, and masking requirements.
Re-run the audit after applying the recommended fixes.
